remaining_params.SpellDescription: Create a 3/3 green Phyrexian Beast creature token with toxic 1. (Players dealt combat damage by this creature also get a poison counter.)

params.Description: Corrupted — As long as an opponent has three or more poison counters and CARDNAME is in your graveyard, it has flashback {2}{G}. (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)
